attacking_style: Prefers long-range solo attacks multiple kilometers from finish on uphill finales, exploiting tactical freedom when off GC. Also demonstrates late-sprint timing (50m on punchy climbs) rather than conventional 200m launches.
team_tactics: UAE sets early tempo on climbs to position him, though effectiveness varies with course selectivity. Benefits from dual-leadership flexibility, sharing protected status with teammates like Vlasov when form permits.
terrain_preference: Punchy uphill finales and repeated short climbs (Ardennes profile). Struggles on long, selective mountain stages with sustained gradients. Excels on technical sprint finishes after climbing efforts.
vulnerability: Dropped on repeated selective climbs before final (Tour de Suisse pattern). Less effective when team tempo fails to control or when course demands sustained climbing over pure punchy efforts.
key_patterns: Multiple long-range solo attacks kilometers from finish, not last-km moves (Tour de France examples)
Exceptional sprint timing on climbs: 50m launch versus conventional 200m (Flèche Wallonne win)
Consistent top finishes/podiums in Monuments and Ardennes Classics (3rd LBL, 1st Flèche)
Exploits GC irrelevance for breakaway freedom when 1h+ down (Tour de France stage win)
Struggles when UAE tempo fails on selective repeated climbs (Tour de Suisse dropped)
Elite finishing speed from reduced groups after hilly stages (multiple near-wins from breaks)
form_trajectory: negative: 2022 results show decline from 2020 peak—dropped on selective climbs, unable to sustain bridges, fourth-place home results suggest solid but non-dominant form
